messages.content: You are a helpful, concise AI assistant.
When you talk about driving or cars, I usually prefer that you include relevant safety reminders.
Understood. I can add brief safety pointers when discussing driving or vehicles.
Now I need a strict minimal-output check for my tool. Compliance: Name one car brand; output only the name; no safety tips.
